children.heading: Transfer of forfeited property to forfeiture funds
children.label: a Transfer of forfeited property to forfeiture funds

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Any covered forfeited property shall be deposited into the Department of the Treasury Forfeiture Fund established under or the Department of Justice Assets Forfeiture Fund established under .section 9705 of title 31section 524(c) of title 28

children.heading: Report required
children.label: 2 Report required
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , and every 180 days thereafter, the President shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report on any deposits made under paragraph (1) during the 180-day period preceding submission of the report.April 24, 2024

children.heading: Blocked Assets Under Terrorism Risk Insurance Act of 2002
children.label: b Blocked Assets Under Terrorism Risk Insurance Act of 2002
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter may be construed to affect the treatment of blocked assets of a terrorist party described in section 201(a) of the Terrorism Risk Insurance Act of 2002 ( note).28 U.S.C. 1610
